markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 114-C — Escort vehicle

A motor vehicle which operates under its own power and which precedes or follows a vehicle or combination of vehicles that has been issued a special hauling permit by the department of transportation, a municipality or public authority pursuant to § 385 (Dimensions and weights of vehicles) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
